sql_array: CREATE DICTIONARY my_dict AS (key1 'value1', key2 'value2', key3 'value3');
UPDATE my_dict SET value = 'new_value' WHERE key = 'key2';

CREATE FUNCTION DB.DBA.RDF_INSERT_FROM_DICT (in graph_iri varchar, in triples_dict any) RETURNS varchar { DECLARE triples any; DECLARE ins_count integer; ins_count := 0; WHILE (dict_size(triples_dict) > 0) { triples := dict_destructive_list_rnd_keys(triples_dict, 100); DB.DBA.RDF_INSERT_TRIPLES(graph_iri, triples, 1); ins_count := ins_count + length(triples); } RETURN sprintf('Inserted %d triples into <%s>', ins_count, graph_iri); };
